title: Rānī Heat Wave
lead: Rānī is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.34. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Rānī is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.7 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 79%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 12.5 km/h is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
